title: beatonia lutea
intro: Beatonia lutea, also known as wild chamomile, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects. The health benefits of Beatonia lutea include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Beatonia lutea can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be consumed orally or used topically to reap its benefits.
